subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He in Whose hand is the dominion of the heavens and of the earth, and verily He hath knowledge of all things. His is the bounty and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی بیده ملکوت ملک السموات و الارض و انه کان بکل شی علیما له الجود و
